'''''Ironhand''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] serving in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Starfleet]] of the [[Imperial Remnant]] at least [[19 ABY/Legends|fifteen years after]] the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. Under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Argona]], this was one of four [[Braxant Sector Fleet]] Star Destroyers—the others were the [[Relentless (Dorja)|''Relentless'']], the ''[[Tyrannic]]'' and the ''[[Obliterator]]''—that pledged its allegiance to a recuperated [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]]—who was in fact a con-artist named [[Flim (Human)|Flim]]. Its mission was to exploit the [[Caamas Document Crisis]] in order to begin a civil war within the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. The plan was to spark the conflict over the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] homeworld of [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]]. In that capacity, ''Ironhand'' was outfitted with a [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaking device]], but the plan was foiled and the Star Destroyers were ordered to retreat.
